issues.display_title: Issue #427: [API] Suggest Search Place Detail Post endpoint
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 17/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Route :

GET /places/detail/posts/suggest/:location_group_slug

Param :

  • search
  • limit
  • page

Example Implementation :

GET /places/detail/posts/suggest/:location_group_slug?search=ha

Implement a new lightweight, typo-tolerant typeahead endpoint that suggests location_name values within a single place, based on the design doc docs/plans/2026-06-15-suggest-place-detail-post-design.md.

Endpoint: GET /places/detail/posts/suggest/:location_group_slug
Params: search (required), limit (default 10, cap 20), threshold (internal default 0.2)
Returns: distinct location_name → { data_posts: [{ location_name }], total }

Scope of work

  1. DB migration (docs/migrations/): enable pg_trgm + add GIN trigram index (gin_trgm_ops) on posts.location_name. Idempotent (IF NOT EXISTS) + reversible down migration.
  2. Model: add PlaceDetailPostSuggestItem { LocationName } to src/Models/PlacesModel.go.
  3. Action: GetPlaceDetailPostsSuggest in src/Action/V1/Places/PlaceDetailPostsSuggest.go — query views_place_detail_posts scoped to location_group_slug; match location_name (prefix → substring → fuzzy similarity) OR description (substring only); GROUP BY location_name; order prefix-first → similarity → SUM(total_views); handle +/space convention; reuse role validation + ec encryption envelope from GetPlaceDetailPosts.
  4. Controller + Route: thin passthrough in PlacesControllers.go + register the 4-segment route in PlacesRoutes.go (no shadowing of /detail/posts/:location_group_slug).

Acceptance criteria

  • Endpoint returns distinct, ranked location_name suggestions for the given place.
  • search empty → 400; limit defaults 10, capped at 20.
  • + converted back to spaces in output; matching works for both name and description.
  • Role validation (user/viewer, else 401); ec=true envelope matches GetPlaceDetailPosts (incl. e4 for viewer).
  • Existing /places/detail/posts/:location_group_slug unchanged.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  1. Prefix: search=malio → Malioboro Street ranks first.
  2. Typo/fuzzy: search=maliboro → still returns Malioboro Street.
  3. Description match: a term present only in a post's description surfaces that post's location_name.
  4. +/space parity: search=malioboro street returns "Malioboro Street" (not Malioboro+Street).
  5. Distinct: a place with many posts of the same name returns that name once.
  6. Scope isolation: suggestions for place A never include names belonging only to place B.
  7. Limit cap: limit=100 returns at most 20.
  8. Empty search → 400; no match → 200 with [].
  9. Roles: user and viewer both work; e4 present only for viewer; other roles → 401.
  10. Encryption parity: ec=true vs absent decode to identical data.
  11. Performance: confirm the trigram index is used (EXPLAIN), acceptable latency on a populated place.
  12. Regression: existing detail-posts list endpoint behaves identically.

Design: docs/plans/2026-06-15-suggest-place-detail-post-design.md

RESULT 17/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Implementation;

Summary

Implement the core utility GetValidIncludes(includeParam string, allowedFields []string) []string that powers include parameter support across all APIs.

  • File: src/Utils/Functions/Functions.go
  • Signature: GetValidIncludes(includeParam string, allowedFields []string) []string

Logic

  1. Split the include comma-separated string into a slice.
  2. Iterate each requested field.
  3. Security: explicitly ignore the id field if requested by the client.
  4. Validate each field against the provided whitelist (allowedFields).
  5. Return a clean slice of valid SQL column names.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  • Valid fields: include=username,email, allowedFields=[username,email,avatar] → returns [username, email].
  • Field not in whitelist: include=username,password → password dropped, returns [username].
  • id injection: include=id,username → id always dropped even if present in allowedFields, returns [username].
  • Empty input: include="" → returns empty slice (no error / no panic).
  • Whitespace & casing: include= username , email → verify trimming behaviour matches spec.
  • Duplicates: include=email,email → confirm expected handling (dedupe or pass-through).
  • SQL safety: confirm no field outside the whitelist can ever reach .Select() (no SQL-injection vector).

Source: docs/brainstorm/CHANGELOG_INCLUDE_PARAM.md · Priority: High · Blocking dependency for all other include tasks.

issues.display_title: Issue #429: [include] Support include param on User Detail API
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 17/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Route :

GET /users/detail

New Param :

  • include

Allowed include :
username, email, fullname, avatar, country, birthday, gender, about_me, email_info, encrypt

Example Implementation :

GET /users/detail?include=username,avatar

Summary

Add include parameter support to the User Detail API.

  • Endpoint: GET /v1/users/detail
  • File: src/Action/V1/Users/UserDetail.go
  • Whitelisted fields: username, email, fullname, avatar, country, birthday, gender, about_me, email_info, encrypt
  • Security note: id is fetched internally for DB joins but strictly excluded from the whitelist and the final response.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  • No include: response returns the original default field set (backward compatible).
  • Subset: include=username,avatar → response contains only those fields.
  • id excluded: include=id,username → id never appears in the response body.
  • Invalid field: include=password → ignored, no error.
  • Full whitelist: request all 10 fields → all returned correctly.
  • Auth: verify access-control still works (e.g. private-profile rules unchanged).

Source: docs/brainstorm/CHANGELOG_INCLUDE_PARAM.md · Priority: Medium · Depends on GetValidIncludes utility.

issues.display_title: Issue #430: [include] Support include param on Detail Post API
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 17/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Route :

GET /posts/detail

New Param :

  • include

Allowed include :
slug, thumbnail, description, location_name, location_post, created_at, post_type, panorama, panorama_preview, panorama_quality, animation, animation_filter, little_planet, little_planet_filter, pending, avatar, fullname, username, potd, broadcast_data, visibility, affiliate, hotspot, category_id

Example Implementation :

GET /posts/detail?slug=lf4ddd947b3-2025121707231100&include=category_id,panorama_preview,fullname

Summary

Add include parameter support to the Detail Post API.

  • Endpoint: GET /v1/posts/detail
  • File: src/Action/V1/Posts/DetailPost.go

Whitelisted fields (Published): category_id, created_at, description, slug, animation, animation_filter, little_planet, little_planet_filter, location_post, location_name, panorama_preview, thumbnail, panorama, post_type, panorama_quality, pending, avatar, fullname, encrypt, username, potd, broadcast_data, visibility, affiliate, hotspot

Whitelisted fields (Draft/Processing): slug, thumbnail, post_type, created_at, is_processing, description, location_post, location_name, avatar, fullname, encrypt, username, visibility

Logic: encrypt and visibility are always fetched internally to perform access-control checks, even if not requested in include.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  • No include: default field set returned (backward compatible).
  • Published subset: include=slug,thumbnail → only those returned.
  • Access control intact: request a post WITHOUT encrypt/visibility in include → access control still enforced (private/hidden posts blocked).
  • Draft vs published: verify the correct whitelist applies for a processing/draft post vs a published one.
  • id excluded: include=id,slug → id not in response.
  • Invalid field: ignored gracefully.

Source: docs/brainstorm/CHANGELOG_INCLUDE_PARAM.md · Priority: High · Depends on GetValidIncludes utility.

issues.display_title: Issue #433: [include] Support include param on Timeline Profile API
issues.main_description_html:
RESULT 17/06/26

✅ Implementation Complete — Ready for Unit Testing

Route :

GET /posts/timeline-profile/:username

New Param :

  • include

Allowed include :
slug, thumbnail, panorama_preview, panorama_quality, post_type, animation, animation_filter, little_planet, little_planet_filter, created_at, pending, potd, broadcast_data, is_processing, visibility

Example Implementation :

GET /posts/timeline-profile/lundara?limit=1&page=25&include=panorama_quality,slug,post_type

Summary

Add include parameter support to the Timeline Profile API.

  • Endpoint: GET /v1/posts/profile/:username
  • File: src/Action/V1/Posts/TimeLineListPostProfile.go
  • Whitelisted fields: slug, thumbnail, panorama_preview, panorama_quality, post_type, animation, animation_filter, little_planet, little_planet_filter, created_at, pending, potd, broadcast_data, is_processing, visibility
  • Implementation: field selection must be applied to both the published post view and the active processing post query.

🧪 Testing Scenario (for tester)

  • No include: default fields returned (backward compatible).
  • Subset on published: include=slug,thumbnail → only those returned.
  • Processing posts: verify the same include selection applies to processing/in-progress posts.
  • Own vs others profile: confirm visibility/is_processing rules unchanged when viewing own vs another user's profile.
  • id excluded from every item.
  • Invalid field: ignored gracefully.

Source: docs/brainstorm/CHANGELOG_INCLUDE_PARAM.md · Priority: Medium · Depends on GetValidIncludes utility.
